hero.title: Keep your 2nd-Brain unlimited
hero.subtitle: Your records stay free and on your device. Add more AI when you want it.
hero.speech: The core is yours, free. Plus just adds more room to think together.

notifyHint: We will let you know when Plus is ready. No charge until you choose it.
notified: Thanks. We will reach out at launch.

free.name: Free
free.f2: Everything stays on your device by default

plus.name: Plus
plus.tagline: More room to think with AI
